sa:features.rdfs:label: Description
sa:features.sa:description: Gnomes are brilliant tinkerers, eccentric inventors, and whimsical survivors who thrive in cluttered workshops and zero-G crawlspaces.

sa:features.rdfs:label: Gnome Cunning
sa:features.sa:description: You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma Saving Throws against magic.

sa:features.rdfs:label: Description
sa:features.sa:description: Orcs are a primal force in the sector, born of survival, honed by battle, and governed by a simple truth: the strong rule, and the weak get eaten.

sa:features.rdfs:label: Description
sa:features.sa:description: Elves are graceful, long-lived beings who blend arcane mastery with high art and elevated ideals.
